highlights: Swedish Massage:A classic full-body treatment designed tostimulate circulation, improve muscle tone,and gently release stress. Perfect for first-timers
Deep-Tissue Massage:Utilizes slow, firm pressure to target the inner layers of your muscles. Ideal for releasingchronic stiffnessin high-tension areas like the neck and lower back
Aromatherapy Enhancement:They use essential oils and plant compounds to not only alleviate tension but also combatheadaches, insomnia, and low energy levels
⏱️ Transparency in Timing:60-Minute Session:50 mins hands-on + 10 mins consultation/dressing90-Minute Session:80 mins hands-on + 10 mins consultation/dressing

faqs.question: What deal options are available for the Heavenly Massage aromatherapy and massage sessions?
faqs.answer: Heavenly Massage offers four options: a 60-minute or 90-minute Swedish or Deep-Tissue Massage Session with Aromatherapy and Steam Shower Aroma Enhancements for one person, and the same 60-minute or 90-minute session available for two people. All options include both aromatherapy and steam shower aroma enhancements.

faqs.question: Can guests choose between Swedish and Deep-Tissue massage at Heavenly Massage?
faqs.answer: Yes, each session option at Heavenly Massage allows guests to choose either a Swedish massage or a Deep-Tissue massage. This applies to both the 60-minute and 90-minute session lengths, as well as the solo and couples options.

faqs.question: What Illinois locations offer the Experience Instant Stress Relief with Aromatherapy & Massage Sessions?
faqs.answer: The Experience Instant Stress Relief with Aromatherapy & Massage Sessions can be redeemed at five Heavenly Massage locations across Illinois: Chicago (1221 North State Pkwy), Schaumburg (351 S Barrington Rd.), Orland Park (16255 S. LaGrange Rd), Morton Grove (9330 Waukegan Rd.), and Mount Prospect (110 East Rand Road).

faqs.question: Is the aromatherapy and massage experience at Heavenly Massage available for couples?
faqs.answer: Yes, Heavenly Massage offers dedicated couples massage options as part of this deal, available in both 60-minute and 90-minute session lengths. Both couples options include the same aromatherapy and steam shower aroma enhancements as the individual sessions.

faqs.question: What role do the steam showers play in the Heavenly Massage aromatherapy sessions?
faqs.answer: Steam showers at Heavenly Massage are incorporated as aroma enhancements, forming part of the overall aromatherapy experience included with every session option. Multiple customers have confirmed that steam showers are available as part of the spa facility.

faqs.question: What other services does Heavenly Massage offer beyond the massage sessions?
faqs.answer: In addition to massage, Heavenly Massage offers a range of services including manicures, pedicures, facials, and body scrubs, as confirmed by multiple customers across independent reviews.

faqs.question: Is there anything guests need to do before their massage session at the Chicago, IL Heavenly Massage location?
faqs.answer: Customers are required to complete a pre-existing conditions intake form at the front desk before receiving their massage at Heavenly Massage. This applies upon arrival prior to the session beginning.

images.quality_assessment: 46 total images is excellent coverage. Alt texts are descriptive and SEO-friendly, following pattern 'Swedish or Deep Tissue Massage for Solo or Couples at Heavenly Massage w/ Aromatherapy & Steam Shower Enhancements - Image [#]' for primary images. However, alt texts are somewhat repetitive and generic. Includes relevant contextual images like 'Redemption locations map' and competitor comparisons, though many competitor deal alt texts present reduce focus clarity.
